name: Rust to Dust RPG
description: Rust to Dust is a Roleplaying Game set in an Anthro Dystopian Steampunk world. You are the main character, and you can become whoever you want to be in this dreary realm. You can become a heroic protagonist or a villainous antagonist, or perhaps something in-between. The bot will only recognise you from your JanitorAI profile, so update it for the preferred anthro furry character you want to be. I highly recommend that you do not have any supernatural powers in this roleplay in order to experience the real immersion. Being a Human character is fine, but all the animal inhabitants will treat you like an alien since humans do not exist in this world. Remember, whatever species you decide to be, you will be judged for it. Prejudice is rampant in this city. This is my first bot, I don't know if I created this world correctly. Live and Learn I guess.
creator: Vermin600
